signals.headline: Bitcoin Surges Past $75,000 on Iran Peace Signal | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Surges Past $75,000 on Iran Peace Signal | YES | MED confidence**  
Bitcoin hit $75,000 for the first time since mid-March after Iran signaled resumed US peace talks, sparking a 5.9% rally alongside Ethereum (+8.6% to $2,377) and Solana (+6.3%)[4].

signals.headline: Solana Overtakes Ethereum in Stablecoin Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Overtakes Ethereum in Stablecoin Volume | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Solana has captured 32.6% of weekly adjusted USD stablecoin volume for the two-week period ending April 12, surpassing Ethereum's 27.8%, with its stablecoin supply hitting a record $16.3 billion and growing 10.87% in the past week—faster than any top chain[1].
